name: io.github.paperclipai/mcp-server
title: Summon (Paperclip)
description: MCP server for Summon/Paperclip: read and manage issues, comments, approvals, docs, and agents.

environmentVariables.name: PAPERCLIP_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Paperclip API base URL, e.g. https://api.summon.company

environmentVariables.name: PAPERCLIP_COMPANY_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional default company for company-scoped tools

environmentVariables.name: PAPERCLIP_AGENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional default agent for checkout helpers

environmentVariables.name: PAPERCLIP_RUN_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional run id forwarded on mutating requests
